full_text:
Cao Xi 曹翕
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Xi (曹翕). Succeeded his father Cao Hui. Paid tribute to Sima Yan by sending his son, Cao Kun. Cao Xi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
